creator: Karli.Sjoberg@slu.se
text:
Created attachment 167167
Makefile patch

Hi!

This package depends on the former 'sysutils/puppet' which has changed into 'sysutils/puppet(37|38|4)'. The patch attached changes 'puppet' to 'puppet38'. 4 is still new enough to be scary:)

Best Regards
Karli Sjöberg
